title: Factor with the distributive property (no variables)
description: Practice applying the distributive property to factor numerical expressions (no variables).
topic_path: Topic D: Expanding, factoring, and distributing expressions
Factor with the distributive property (no variables)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Apply the distributive property to factor out the greatest common factor.**

$9+15=$ [[☃ expression 1]]
hints: $\blue{3}$ is the greatest common factor of ${9}$ and ${15}$.
